dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates strong alignment with provided architectural rules through the dedicated 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' steps. Successful schema validation at each stage confirms strict adherence to governance constraints and structured rule application.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The progression from baseline discovery to architecture-work-to-evolution-map indicates a clear cause-effect mapping of architectural components. The intent generator builds logically on the evolution map, suggesting robust causal chaining, though deeper explicit trade-off quantification could be observed in the completion tokens.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine successfully surfaces and resolves architectural trade-offs by cross-referencing the evolution map with governance rules. The structured flow effectively mitigates conflicting requirements, though the tension resolution could benefit from more explicit metric-driven trade-off scoring in future iterations.
